results.primary_keyword: am I currently going through my saturn return
results.feedback: 1. The CTA integration is slightly detached; instead of linking to the birth chart generator again, it should bridge more naturally from the 'Navigating the Saturn Return' section by emphasizing how the upcoming transit tool will help the reader track their specific Saturn progress. 2. Increase specificity by providing a few more concrete examples of how Saturn in different houses (e.g., 10th vs 4th) changes the 'flavor' of the return, rather than just listing two examples. 3. Ensure the word count is closer to the 1600-word target, as the current draft is significantly shorter.
